unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in play()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings reference external calls (bank.transfer and msg.sender.transfer) in the play() function, which can lead to reentrancy.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Weak PRNG in play()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: These findings all relate to the use of a weak PRNG (block.timestamp) in the play() function, including its use in comparisons and the deprecated sha3() function.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight issues with the outdated Solidity version, including known bugs and the need to upgrade.
